"'''The Unseen Planets of ''Star Wars'''''" was an article written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and illustrated by [[Chris Trevas]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Insider 36|''Star Wars Insider'' 36]] and provided details from the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] on a number of planets only mentioned but never seen in the [[original trilogy]].

==Contents==
*[[Anoat system/Legends|Anoat system]]

**[[Deyer/Legends|Deyer]]
*[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]
*[[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]]
*[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]
*[[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]]
